forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly during the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the west in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely during the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost on and east of the ranges. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending east to northeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Mostly sunny. Patches of morning frost east of Leigh Creek. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower in the far northeast in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeasterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
